description: The briefingMutation and chatMutation both use 30s timeouts, but the timeout logic is duplicated. Extract timeout handling into a shared utility function (e.g., fetchWithTimeout) to reduce code duplication and ensure consistent timeout behavior across all AI API calls.
successCriteria: A new utility function fetchWithTimeout exists in client/src/lib/utils.ts or client/src/lib/apiUtils.ts
Both briefingMutation and chatMutation use this shared function
The timeout logic is identical and includes proper AbortController cleanup
